docs.title: central-actions
docs.text:
Welcome to the documentation site for the central-actions repository.

This repository contains reusable GitHub Actions for infrastructure, container, and documentation automation.

docs.title: Actions
docs.text:
• Terraform Deploy
  • Docker Build and Push
  • Doc Build and Deploy

docs.title: Local preview
docs.text:
To preview the site locally:

pip install mkdocs-material
mkdocs serve

docs.title: Doc Build and Deploy
docs.text: The doc-build-deploy action builds documentation and deploys it to GitHub Pages.

docs.title: Inputs
docs.text:
• doc-directory - Path to the documentation source directory. Default: .
  • doc-build-command - Command used to build documentation. Default: mkdocs build
  • publish-directory - Directory containing built docs to publish. Default: ./site
  • github-token - GitHub token used for publishing to gh-pages.

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
uses: ./doc-build-deploy
with:
  doc-directory: "./"
  doc-build-command: "mkdocs build"
  publish-directory: "./site"
  github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

docs.title: Docker Build and Push
docs.text: The docker-build-push action builds a Docker image and pushes it to a container registry.

docs.title: Inputs
docs.text:
• registry - Container registry to push to. Default: docker.io
  • image-name - Name of the image to build and push.
  • dockerfile - Dockerfile path. Default: Dockerfile
  • context - Build context path. Default: .
  • username - Registry username.
  • password - Registry password or token.

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
uses: ./docker-build-push
with:
  registry: docker.io
  image-name: my-app:latest
  username: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}
  password: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD }}

docs.title: Terraform Deploy
docs.text: The terraform-deploy action runs Terraform CLI commands in a target directory.

docs.title: Inputs
docs.text:
• terraform-directory - Path to the Terraform configuration directory. Default: .
  • terraform-command - Terraform command to execute. Default: plan
